memoryArtifacts.description: JOHN de CLAYTON was the eldest son and was born in 1419. In 1440, John married Mary Mainwaring, daughter of William Mainwaring and Amica de Leycester. John and Mary had two sons, Thomas and William, a …

zh.Clayton manor, Lancashire,England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John VI de Clayton於1419年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親Lord Thomas II de Clayton29歲，母親Dorothy de Dutton27歲。他於1439年與Mary Mainwaring在英國藍卡爾克雷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾利藍德。

zh-hans.Clayton manor, Lancashire,England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾克雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John VI de Clayton于1419年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓时，他的父亲Lord Thomas II de Clayton29岁，母亲Dorothy de Dutton27岁。他于1439年与Mary Mainwaring在英国藍卡爾克雷頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾利藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John VI de Clayton was born in 1419, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, his father, Lord Thomas II de Clayton, was 29 and his mother, Dorothy de Dutton, was 27. He married Mary Mainwaring in 1439, in Clayton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1460, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John VI de Clayton est né en 1419, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Thomas II de Clayton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Dorothy de Dutton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Mainwaring en 1439, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John VI de Clayton 1419 in Clayton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Thomas II de Clayton 29 und seine Mutter Dorothy de Dutton 27. Er hat 1439 in Clayton, Lancashire, England Mary Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Leyland, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John VI de Clayton è nato il nel 1419 nel Clayton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Lord Thomas II de Clayton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy de Dutton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary Mainwaring nel 1439, nel Clayton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Leyland, Lancashire, England.

ja.Clayton manor, Lancashire,England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John VI de Claytonが1419年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas II de Claytonは29歳，母Dorothy de Duttonは27歳であった。1439年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンでMary Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアリーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John VI de Clayton(이)가 1419년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Thomas II de Clayton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy de Dutton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 Mary Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Clayton manor, Lancashire,England: Clayton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John VI de Clayton nasceu em 1419, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Thomas II de Clayton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy de Dutton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Mainwaring em 1439, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John VI de Clayton родился в 1419 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Thomas II de Clayton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy de Dutton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Mainwaring в 1439 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1460 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John VI de Clayton nació en 1419, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Thomas II de Clayton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Dorothy de Dutton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary Mainwaring en 1439, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
